title: Candace Owens drops fresh Erika Kirk claims as TPUSA CEO skips event and Charlie Kirk mystery continues to grow
summary_full: Candace Owens made new claims about Erika Kirk and Turning Point USA after the CEO skipped a JD Vance event. She spoke about a traced gun, donor statements, and repeated her “Charlie GPT” theory. Owens also questioned leadership decisions after Charlie Kirk’s death, but she did not present verified proof for any of her allegations.
